name: WF-010 Parent Orchestrator Canonical
description: Selects the route and orchestrates downstream Phase-1 workflow packs.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', route_id: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString() } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, registry_lookup: { workflow_registry: 'registries/workflow_registry.yaml', route_registry: 'registries/route_registry.yaml', skill_registry: 'registries/skill_registry.yaml', provider_registry: 'registries/provider_registry.yaml' } } }];

meta.purpose: Parent orchestrator routing through stage packs.
